001import java.util.Stack;
002
003/**
004 * Stores the state that belongs to the player: identity, current position,
005 * history,
006 * and a personal item list.
007 *
008 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
009 * @version 2026.04.13
010 */
011public class Player {
012    /** Player display name (may be {@code null}). */
013    private String aName;
014    /** Current room occupied by the player. */
015    private Room aCurrentRoom;
016    /** Stack of previously visited rooms, used to support {@code back}. */
017    private Stack<Room> aPreviousRooms;
018    /** Items currently held by the player, keyed by a short lookup name. */
019    private ItemList aItems;
020    /** Current money balance used when buying items. */
021    private int aMoney;
022
023    /**
024     * Creates a player with a name and a starting room.
025     *
026     * @param pName      the player name (can be empty or {@code null})
027     * @param pStartRoom the initial room
028     */
029    public Player(final String pName, final Room pStartRoom) {
030        this.aName = pName;
031        this.aCurrentRoom = pStartRoom;
032        this.aPreviousRooms = new Stack<Room>();
033        this.aItems = new ItemList();
034        this.aMoney = 150;
035    }
036
037    /**
038     * Returns the player's current room.
039     *
040     * @return the current room (may be {@code null} if not initialized)
041     */
042    public Room getCurrentRoom() {
043        return this.aCurrentRoom;
044    }
045
046    /**
047     * Changes the current room, saving the previous one to the history stack.
048     * <p>
049     * Intended to be called by the engine after validating the intended direction.
050     * </p>
051     *
052     * @param pNextRoom the room to move to (may be {@code null})
053     */
054    public void moveTo(final Room pNextRoom) {
055        if (this.aCurrentRoom != null) {
056            this.aPreviousRooms.push(this.aCurrentRoom);
057        }
058        this.aCurrentRoom = pNextRoom;
059    }
060
061    /**
062     * Indicates whether the player can go back to a previous room.
063     *
064     * @return {@code true} if a previous room exists in the history stack
065     */
066    public boolean canGoBack() {
067        return !this.aPreviousRooms.isEmpty();
068    }
069
070    /**
071     * Returns the previous room.
072     *
073     * @return the previous room
074     */
075    public Room getPreviousRoom() {
076        return this.aPreviousRooms.peek();
077    }
078
079    /**
080     * Moves back to the previous room.
081     * <p>
082     * This method assumes {@link #canGoBack()} is {@code true}. If the stack is
083     * empty, {@link Stack#pop()} will throw an exception.
084     * </p>
085     */
086    public void goBack() {
087        this.aCurrentRoom = this.aPreviousRooms.pop();
088    }
089
090    /**
091     * Returns the player name.
092     *
093     * @return the current name (may be {@code null})
094     */
095    public String getName() {
096        return this.aName;
097    }
098
099    /**
100     * Sets the player name.
101     *
102     * @param pName the new name (may be {@code null})
103     */
104    public void setName(final String pName) {
105        this.aName = pName;
106    }
107
108    /**
109     * Retrieves an item from the player's inventory.
110     *
111     * @param pName lookup key used when the item was added
112     * @return the matching {@link Item}, or {@code null}
113     */
114    public Item getItem(final String pName) {
115        return this.aItems.getItem(pName);
116    }
117
118    /**
119     * Adds (or replaces) an item in the player's inventory.
120     *
121     * @param pName lookup key used for later retrieval
122     * @param pItem the item to store
123     */
124    public void addItem(final String pName, final Item pItem) {
125        this.aItems.addItem(pName, pItem);
126    }
127
128    /**
129     * Removes an item from the player's inventory.
130     *
131     * @param pName lookup key of the item to remove
132     */
133    public void removeItem(final String pName) {
134        this.aItems.removeItem(pName);
135    }
136
137    /**
138     * Returns the player's current money balance.
139     *
140     * @return the amount of money the player has
141     */
142    public int getMoney() {
143        return this.aMoney;
144    }
145
146    /**
147     * Sets the player's money balance.
148     *
149     * @param pNewMoney the new amount of money
150     */
151    public void setMoney(final int pNewMoney) {
152        this.aMoney = pNewMoney;
153    }
154
155    /**
156     * Returns a human-readable inventory summary.
157     *
158     * @return formatted item list including total value
159     */
160    public String getItemInventory() {
161        return this.aItems.getItemList();
162    }
163} // Player
